briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby Parks, Recreation & Culture Plan Moves to Drafting Phase
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to receive an update on the city's long-range Parks, Recreation and Culture Plan, which is now entering Phase 3 — the drafting stage. A second round of public engagement is planned for March 2026, giving residents a chance to review and comment on the draft plan before it is finalized.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the March 2026 public engagement — you can give feedback on the draft Parks, Recreation and Culture Plan.

key_dates.label: Burnaby PRC Plan Phase 4 public engagement period opens — comment window
